task_completion.description: Create 4 functional zones and apply distinct floor colors or textures to at least 2 of them.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 2D floor plan or 3D view for at least 4 defined room areas (zones). At least 2 of these zones must have a distinct floor color or texture applied to them, differentiating them from the default floor.

task_completion.description: Draw at least 6 interior partition walls to act as privacy dividers between voting booths.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Count the newly drawn interior wall segments in the 2D plan or 3D view. There should be at least 6 distinct wall segments arranged to separate voting areas.

task_completion.description: Furnish the space with at least 12 total desks, tables, or cabinets.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Count the desks, tables, and cabinets placed in the layout. There should be a combined total of at least 12 visible in the 2D plan or 3D view.

task_completion.description: Furnish the space with at least 12 total chairs or benches.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Count the chairs and benches placed in the layout. There should be a combined total of at least 12 visible in the 2D plan or 3D view.

task_completion.description: Place at least 4 text labels on the floor plan to guide voter flow.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for at least 4 free-floating text elements (e.g., 'Entrance', 'Check-in', 'Voting Booths') placed on the 2D floor plan.

task_completion.description: Add at least 1 dimension line to verify the main aisle or accessible booth width.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for at least 1 dimension line (a line with measurement text and arrows/ticks at the ends) drawn on the 2D floor plan.

integrity.description: The agent must use the SweetHome3D GUI to create the layout.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the SweetHome3D application interface open and being actively used, rather than a terminal window or text editor modifying the .sh3d file directly.

integrity.description: The agent must edit the provided starter file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The SweetHome3D window title bar should display 'polling_station_starter.sh3d'.

integrity.description: The furniture, walls, and labels should be arranged in a logical manner for a polling station.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 2D plan and 3D view should show an organized layout with clear aisles and functional areas, not just a random pile of furniture and walls dumped in one spot to pass the count thresholds.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires modifying 'polling_station_starter.sh3d' in SweetHome3D. The final layout must contain: exactly or more than 4 defined rooms/zones with at least 2 having distinct floor colors, at least 6 interior partition walls, at least 12 desks/tables/cabinets, at least 12 chairs/benches, at least 4 text labels, and at least 1 dimension line. The pass threshold is 70/100 points.
